form.formComment: Comes here off a 38-day let-up. Most recently 3rd of 10 at this track on March 2 over 1400m, 5 len behind Black Tourmaline with 56kg at $55.50. The race before that 5th of 9 at this track on February 6 over 1400m, 14 len behind Onna Yume Raku with 56kg at $17.80. Good effort last start and can build on that performance.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last preparation ran last of 16 at Kyoto Dirt on November 30 over 1200m, 20 len behind Janshi carrying 56.0kg at $17.40. form.formComment: Recent form sound. Returns from a 38-day let-up.
